name: Asukanet Co., Ltd.
summary: Asukanet Co., Ltd. provides personal publishing, memorial design, and aerial imaging services in Japan. The company offers personalized photobooks in small lots, such as book by on-demand printing, as well as related software development; funeral photographs for funeral companies and homes; and aerial display related services. Asukanet Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.
